## Tips for using this vault

- Open the graph (`Ctrl+G`) — same-color dots are connected by concern.
- [[_MOCs/BY_TYPE|By category]] is the strongest connected view.
- [[_MOCs/BY_TOPIC|By topic]] is lighter, cross-cutting guidance.
- [[_MOCs/RECENT|Recently updated]] shows what changed most recently across docs and code.
